a l t l
칮 y s t k l 칮 r
칮 y틣 톢
p a n t k n t
k r 톖 r j i틣 칧 a i s
p r a l t l
p r a r퍈 t
p 톩 c a
p 톩 칧
p a i틣 t a
p o u틣 k a
t a i틣 r a

l 콉 톢
톝틣 v
e i 콂 k 툺
톝 l t a
톝 l s t a
e i r t 톩
톝 l e l l 톝틣 톢 a
f a l t
f a l m l 톝 톢 s
f 톩 n틣 p l n a n
f j o u틣 칧 톩 r
f r 톩 r a i틣
f 툺 h t l퍈 t l t
f r 톩 r c 톩 r c 톩 r
f a틣 r
f a r a
f a i틣 r 톩
k a r k n r
k r a틣 칧 a r
k a틣 s
c 톝 r 칧 톩
k r e i틣 칧 n a i틣 톢
k v 칧

톝틣 r a
h r o u틣 v
h a u틣 k k
h a틣 톢 툺 r
톝틣 r
h 콉 l t
h 툺 r 칧 툺 r
s u틣
j o u틣 l
c퉗 톝 r a n t n
k퉗 톖틣 a
k퉗 v i틣 칧
c퉗 톩 n틣 a
l e i틣 k a
l e i틣 l 톝틣 톢 a
l e i틣 r
l a u틣 t a u틣 k a r
l o u틣 칧
l i틣 s t
l i틣 칧 a r i틣 칧
m a n a
m a n 톩
f 톝 칧 l 톝틣 칧 툺 r
m 톩 n틣 a
m 톩 f t l t a n t
f l t 툺 r
s a n a
s a i틣 l a
s a m a m a
s a m j a 톢 m s o u틣 톢
s a n a n u틣 s a r n
s 콉틣
s 톩 j a
s k 톖틣 r a
s t a l t t a r
s 톖틣 i틣 a
s c 톝 n t l n a n
s t a v
s t o u틣 r 툺 n
s t a r t a n
s v 톩틣 칧
s a틣 v i틣 칧 톩
s r 툺 r s t a n k
s i틣 r a
s o u틣 l
t퉗 톩 l p 톩 l t 톩
r e i틣 l t a
t퉗 톩 n t k a n t
v i틣 칧 a
v 톝틣 r a
v 톝 k
v 톝 r 칧 a
v i s t
a u틣 r a
f o u틣 t 톩
콉틣 k 툺 톢 툺 톢 툺 r
t u틣 t
i틣 s a
풪 톝틣 a
풪 톝 s틣
f 톩 r j 톩 칧
풪 툺 r
